name: coTfsArrToQ
title: coTfsArrToQ
syntax: qword coTfsArrToQ( byte inByteArray[], dword arraysize );
description: The function converts the content of a byte array into a qword value.

parameters.name: inByteArray[]
parameters.description: Array containing the bytes to be converted, recommended array size: 8 byte.

return: Converted value or 0 if parameters are invalid.
